title: Shirahoshi’s Secret Becomes Urgent
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Brook, Luffy. The core story beat is shirahoshi’s secret becomes urgent.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi’s secret becomes urgent, with Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Brook, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Royal Palace, Shell Tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: C'moon! What are you waiting for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're going!! Outside!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but I simply cannot, Luffy- SAMA!! It would be truly un- thinkable to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're the one who said there's places you want to go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not good spending ten whole years cooped up in this place! I know it'd drive me crazy!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I'm taking you out!! As thanks for the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but... if I were to do such a selfish thing... it would be a terrible bother to everyone in the palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where do you want to go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...the ocean forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahhhhh...!! no... b-but... that is just a dream... in truth, I could not possibly do something so outrageous as leaving the tower... I... I... Aahhh...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why does just saying where you wanna go make you start crying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I... I... I am sorry... it took all of my courage just to...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: P... Please do not get angry with meeeeeeeeeeeee! I'm scared... Luffy-sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Man, you can be a real pain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhh, all right, all right! I'm sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that noise?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's really loud...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that guy throwing stuff at you again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't think I like him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...what is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is this noise?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...could it be... decken' s spears?! the shell tower!! Shirahoshii is in danger...!! Are the guards with her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... All the guards have been captured!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You! Pirates!! Go and check on the Princess' safety!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Huh?! What're you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: But your majesty... that would mean revealing the Princess's existence to the...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no other choice under the Circum- stances!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SHELL TOWER IS AT THE NORTHEASTERN EDGE OF THE PALACE!! YOU MUST HURRY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why do I have to take orders from my own hostages...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: silence!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If anything were to happen to my daughter because of you... I would hunt you down to the ends of the ocean!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii is my only daughter!! And for certain un- fortunate reasons, her life is under constant threat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Would you happen to mean the mermaid Princess?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allow me to be of service, your most eminent majesty!!! And by the by...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it, Brooo Oook!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: ...would it be possible for me to see her panties?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh...!! I am at a loss for words! The fiend has rushed off with the most repulsive of objectives in mind!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Now the Princess is in even more danger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait one moment, Skeleton!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: M - Mini-ster...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not ask that you until me!! But please, at least take me with you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The shell tower is my responsibility!! If anything were to happen to the princess...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I would sooner die a thousand deaths!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You like her, don't you?:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: P - Prepo- Steross!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Such Inso- Lance!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Sanji-san, I fear I may beat you to the mark! YoHo hoho!

summary: Shirahoshi’s Secret Becomes Urgent. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
